path: PNGS/Aqa Muhammad ﷺ/Ali has value greater than leaders of Jannah.png
text: Itwas narrated that Ibn ‘Umar said: “The Messenger of Allah said: ‘Hasan and (8 wil be the leaders of the Youth of Paradise, and their father is better than them.* Grade: Hasan (Darussalam) Reference & Sunan Ibn Majah 118
